name: Fear

rulesText.description: Turns body horror and social dread into battlefield control. Use when the encounter wants panic, scattering, and loss of nerve instead of raw damage.

mechanics.label: Frightened
mechanics.description: Failed saves force the target to Dash away from you.

mechanics.label: Drop Item
mechanics.description: A failed save makes the target drop what it is holding.

desc: Turns body horror and social dread into battlefield control. Use when the encounter wants panic, scattering, and loss of nerve instead of raw damage.
